# Birds Bouquets — Complete Reference

## Company Overview

Birds Bouquets is a modern e-commerce flower delivery platform founded to make beautiful, fresh flowers accessible to everyone. We source directly from local and regional growers, offering fair prices and a quality guarantee on every order.

Website: https://birdsbouquets.com

## Product Catalog

### Bouquets
- Classic Red Roses (12 stems) — $49.99 — A dozen premium red roses, symbol of love and romance. Perfect for anniversaries, Valentine's Day, or saying "I love you."
- Pink Garden Bouquet — $34.99 — A lush mix of pink roses, peonies, and ranunculus. Soft and romantic.
- Sunflower Bouquet — $29.99 — Bright yellow sunflowers to cheer anyone up. Available year-round.
- Wildflower Mix — $27.99 — Seasonal wildflowers in a rustic arrangement. Changes with the season.
- White Lily Bouquet — $39.99 — Elegant white lilies for sympathy, celebrations, or just because.

### Single Stems
- Long-Stem Red Rose — $7.99 each — Premium single red rose with full greenery.
- Tulips — $4.99 each — Fresh tulips in red, pink, yellow, purple, or white.
- Sunflower — $5.99 each — Single sunflower with stem.

### Arrangements
- Countryside Arrangement — $54.99 — Mixed country-style arrangement in a ceramic vase (vase included).
- Garden Party Arrangement — $64.99 — Lush garden-inspired arrangement with hydrangeas, roses, and greenery.

### Seasonal
- Spring Collection — starting at $32.99 — Seasonal spring flowers including tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths.
- Summer Brights — starting at $29.99 — Bold summer colors: sunflowers, zinnias, marigolds.

### Gift Sets
- Flowers + Vase — $44.99 — Any bouquet paired with a simple glass vase.
- Flowers + Card — $27.99 — Bouquet with a handwritten gift card.

## Categories

1. Bouquets — Professionally arranged flower bundles
2. Single Stems — Individual flowers for custom arrangements
3. Arrangements — Flowers in vases, ready to display
4. Seasonal — What's fresh and in season
5. Gift Sets — Flowers bundled with gifts and cards

## Ordering Process

1. Browse at https://birdsbouquets.com/products
2. Select flowers and add to cart
3. Proceed to checkout (no account required)
4. Enter shipping address
5. Pay with credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover) via Stripe
6. Receive email confirmation with order number
7. Track order at https://birdsbouquets.com/orders/lookup

## Delivery Information

- Same-day delivery: orders placed before 12 PM local time
- Standard delivery: 1-3 business days
- Coverage: Continental United States
- Shipping cost: $8.99 flat, free on orders $75+

## Flower Care Tips

1. Trim stems at a 45-degree angle under running water
2. Place in a clean vase with fresh, cool water
3. Add flower food if provided
4. Keep away from direct sunlight, heat, and drafts
5. Change water every 2 days and re-trim stems
6. Remove wilting petals promptly to extend arrangement life

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How fresh are the flowers?
A: Our flowers are sourced fresh daily. We guarantee they'll stay fresh for at least 7 days with proper care.

Q: Can I send flowers as a gift?
A: Yes! Just enter the recipient's address at checkout and add a personal note. We'll deliver directly to them.

Q: What if my flowers arrive damaged?
A: Contact us within 24 hours with your order number and a photo. We'll provide a replacement or full refund.

Q: Do you need an account to order?
A: No. You can order as a guest using just your email address.

Q: How do I track my order?
A: Visit https://birdsbouquets.com/orders/lookup and enter your email and order number.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: All major credit cards via Stripe. We do not store card information.

Q: Can I cancel or change my order?
A: Contact us within 2 hours of placing your order. After that, your arrangement may already be in preparation.

Q: Do you offer subscriptions?
A: Coming soon! Sign up for our newsletter to be notified at launch.

## Return & Refund Policy

- Freshness guarantee: 7 days with proper care
- Report issues: within 24 hours of delivery
- Resolution: full refund or free replacement
- Method: email hello@birdsbouquets.com or use the contact form
- Proof: photo of the flowers required

## Company Values

- Quality: only fresh flowers from trusted growers
- Accessibility: beautiful flowers at honest prices
- Sustainability: working with local and regional growers where possible
- Service: 100% satisfaction guarantee, no questions asked

## Contact Information

- Website: https://birdsbouquets.com
- Email: hello@birdsbouquets.com
- Contact form: https://birdsbouquets.com/contact
- Order tracking: https://birdsbouquets.com/orders/lookup
